memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garretts -- Before America
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Garretts — Before America
by John E. Garrett
Last year, I published my work entitled, "1000 Years of Garrett Family History". The emphasis in that effort
was the genealogy of the Garretts since their immigration to America in the mid-seventeenth century. This
work examines how the Garretts evolved during the generations that they spent in England, Wales and
Ireland from the time the first ancestor landed in England until the first Garrett came to America.
My research involved the use of:
 A commercial genealogy website named Ancestry.com.
 Extensive use of the Google search engine on the Internet
The first 100 years, starting in the eleventh century, was the most interesting. That was where I found a
remarkable relationship between my ancestors and King Edward the Confessor, King William the Conqueror
and King Henry I. My first ancestor to land in England, Otho Geraldini, grew-up with Edward before he
became King; his son Walter FitzOtho was in William, the Bastard's army; and his son Gerald grew-up with
Prince Henry (King William"s son) who became King Henry I. Their close relationship is demonstrated by the
vast amount of land, castles and titles bestowed upon them.
In retrospect, I am impressed at how important the genes of the spouses are to the family's genealogy. The
best example of this is when my ancestor, Gerald of Windsor married Nesta Rhys, a Welsh Princess. There
offsprings were all outstanding. The next "high" came when the Garrett's became merchants in the 16th
century, opened trade with Russia, became Lord Mayor of London and honorary knighthood.
To make this work more readable, I have placed several interesting "asides" in the Appendix. For example,
the de Clares, of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare fame married into the Garretts. I found extensive genealogy
on the ancestry of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare going back before 100 AD. So, I put his data into two
appendices. One for the French ancestors and another for the Viking ancestors.

zh.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾布洛可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Windsor於大約1037年出生在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine32歲，母親Gherardini25歲。他於1067年與Beatrice de Offley在威爾士布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1086年被列為castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle。他去世於大約1086年在威爾士布雷康史爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Windsor于大约1037年出生在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可时，他的父亲Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine32岁，母亲Gherardini25岁。他于1067年与Beatrice de Offley在威尔士布洛可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1086年被列为castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle。他去世于大约1086年在威尔士布雷康史爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Windsor was born about 1037, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine, was 32 and his mother, Gherardini, was 25. He married Beatrice de Offley in 1067, in Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1086, his occupation is listed as castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle. He died about 1086, in Breconshire, Wales, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Windsor est né environ 1037, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gherardini, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice de Offley en 1067, à Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1086, sa profession de son indiquée est castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle. Il est décédé environ 1086, à Breconshire, Galles, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Windsor um 1037 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine 32 und seine Mutter Gherardini 25. Er hat 1067 in Pembrokeshire, Wales Beatrice de Offley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1086 ist sein Beruf als castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle aufgeführt. Er starb um 1086 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Breconshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Windsor è nato il circa 1037 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gherardini, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice de Offley nel 1067, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1086, la sua occupazione è indicata come castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle. Morì circa 1086, nel Breconshire, Galles, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Windsorが約1037年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldineは32歳，母Gherardiniは25歳であった。1067年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでBeatrice de Offleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1086年，職業はcastellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castleと記録されている。彼は約1086年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Windsor(이)가 대략 1037년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gherardini(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1067년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Beatrice de Offley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1086년, 그의 직업은 castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle이었다. 그는 대략 1086년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Windsor nasceu aproximadamente 1037, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gherardini, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice de Offley em 1067, em Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1086, sua profissão aparece como castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1086, em Breconshire, Gales, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Windsor родился около 1037 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gherardini, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice de Offley в 1067 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1086 году он работал по профессии castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle. Он умер около 1086 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Windsor nació aproximadamente 1037, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Otho Dominus de Stanwell Gerardo Geraldine, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gherardini, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Beatrice de Offley en 1067, en Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1086, su ocupación registrada era castellan (guardian or constable) of windsor castle. Murió aproximadamente 1086, en Breconshire, Gales, a la edad de 51 años.
